root_cause: The package 'some-missing-package' could not be found in the npm registry.
evidence_lines: build	step	2023-10-01T10:00:31Z npm ERR! code E404
build	step	2023-10-01T10:00:32Z npm ERR! 404 Not Found - GET https://registry.npmjs.org/some-missing-package - Not found
remediation_steps: Verify the package name in package.json and ensure it exists in the npm registry.
Remove the missing package from dependencies if it is no longer needed.
